prestazioni: Engine swap to a Ford FE-series 427 SOHC 'Cammer' (7.0L V8, engine code: FE-SOHC) with forged internals including Manley 4340 steel connecting rods, JE 12.5:1 compression forged pistons, and a custom billet crankshaft by Callies Performance. Paired with a Holley Dominator 1150 CFM carburetor on an Edelbrock Victor Jr. intake manifold, tuned for 650+ HP on 110-octane race fuel.

Full custom 4-speed Tremec TKO-600 transmission with a McLeod twin-disc clutch (RST 3000 series) and a Ford 9-inch rear end with a Detroit Locker differential, 4.11:1 gear ratio, and Moser Engineering 35-spline axles for drag strip durability.

Custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system by Stainless Works with 4-into-1 headers (1.875-inch primaries) and Flowmaster Super 44 mufflers, paired with a NOS Big Shot nitrous oxide kit (250 HP shot) and a custom MSD Digital 7 ignition system with Blaster 2 coils for precise timing control.
estetica: Full custom body kit by Ringbrothers, including hand-formed steel front splitter, rear diffuser, and widened fender flares to accommodate Mickey Thompson ET Street R drag radials (295/50R15 front, 335/50R15 rear) on 15x10 and 15x12 Billet Specialties Vintec wheels.

Custom interior by Katzkin Leather, featuring Recaro SRD bucket seats with 4-point harnesses (Schroth Profi II), a custom roll cage by Chassisworks (8-point, mild steel), and a custom dashboard with Dakota Digital HDX gauges (including a 10,000 RPM tachometer and fuel pressure/boost gauges).

Exterior paint by BASF Glasurit in a custom 'Midnight Pearl' hue with hand-painted gold leaf accents on the hood scoop and side stripes, paired with Hella Rallye 3000 headlights and custom LED taillights by United Pacific for a retro-modern aesthetic.
